summary: A bar brawl in Vembayam reportedly escalated when one man allegedly set another alight with petrol, causing severe burns to three individuals requiring hospital treatment.

title: Nurse’s timely CPR saves truck driver’s life after cardiac arrest on Wayanad highway
summary: A nurse's swift CPR revived a truck driver suffering a suspected cardiac arrest on a highway. She continued treatment en route to hospital, where he is now recovering, crediting the nurse with saving his life.

title: Man arrested for stealing rice, utensils from school kitchen in Thrissur

title: Remand prisoner attempts suicide by consuming phenyl at Idukki jail
